ActorFrame.children:
<Layer File="Sprint trail.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 1 and trail[z] == 1 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; trail[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]-Vx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.15) self:queuecommand('Update') end" UpdateCommand="%function(self) trail[self:GetZ()] = 2 end" /> <Layer File="Sprint trail.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 1 and trail[z] == 2 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; trail[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]-Vx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.15) self:queuecommand('Update') end" UpdateCommand="%function(self) trail[self:GetZ()] = 3 end" /> <Layer File="Sprint trail.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 1 and trail[z] == 3 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; trail[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]-Vx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.15) self:queuecommand('Update') end" UpdateCommand="%function(self) trail[self:GetZ()] = 4 end" /> <Layer File="Sprint trail.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 1 and trail[z] == 4 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; trail[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]-Vx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.15) self:queuecommand('Update') end" UpdateCommand="%function(self) trail[self:GetZ()] = 5 end" /> <Layer File="Sprint trail.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 1 and trail[z] == 5 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; trail[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]-Vx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.15) self:queuecommand('Update') end" UpdateCommand="%function(self) trail[self:GetZ()] = 1 end" /> <Layer File="jump trail.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 3 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]-Vy[z]) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.3)end" />
<Layer File="wall trail.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 4 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]-Vx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]-Vy[z]) self:setstate(1)end" />
<Layer File="splash.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom*1.08) self:zoomy(zoom*.44) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 5 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]+6) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.3)end" />
<Layer File="wall splash.sprite" SetCommand="%function(self) self:z(n) end" ZoomCommand="%function(self) zoom = Object[self:GetZ()]:GetZoom(); self:zoom(zoom) end" SplashMessageCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() if math.abs(splash[z]) == 6 then self:playcommand('Animate') end end" AnimateCommand="%function(self) z = self:GetZ() self:playcommand('Zoom') if splash[z] < 0 then self:rotationy(180) else self:rotationy(0) end; splash[z] = 0; z = self:GetZ(); self:x(Dx[z]); self:y(Dy[z]) self:setstate(1) self:sleep(.3)end" />
